zh.lifeSummary: 當John Neville於1437年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓時，他的父親Thomas de Neville32歲，母親Elizabeth Babington43歲。他於大約1459年與Anne Mablethorpe在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾朗 塞頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1516年4月26日在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Neville于1437年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Neville32岁，母亲Elizabeth Babington43岁。他于大约1459年与Anne Mablethorpe在英国英格兰林可爾史爾朗 塞頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1516年4月26日在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Neville was born in 1437, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Neville, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Babington, was 43. He married Anne Mablethorpe about 1459, in Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 26 April 1516, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Neville est né en 1437, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Neville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Babington, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Anne Mablethorpe environ 1459, à Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1516, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Nevilleが1437年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Nevilleは32歳，母Elizabeth Babingtonは43歳であった。約1459年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロング スットオンでAnne Mablethorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1516年4月26日に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Neville(이)가 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Neville(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Babington(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 론그 수턴에서 Anne Mablethorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1516년 4월 26일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Neville родился в 1437 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Neville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Babington, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Mablethorpe около 1459 г. в местности лонг суттон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 26 апреля 1516 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.
